story.iWant: to implement complete project CRUD and member management endpoints
story.soThat: users can create projects, manage members, and collaborate on threads
story.tasks: - Create Project entities, DTOs, and repository (AC: #1-#10) - Implement ProjectController with CRUD endpoints (AC: #1-#5, #9) - Implement ProjectService with business logic (AC: #1, #9) - Implement ProjectMemberController with member management (AC: #6, #7, #8) - Implement ProjectMemberService with role validation (AC: #8, #10) - Integrate AuthorizationService for RBAC enforcement (AC: #4, #6, #7, #10) - Write comprehensive tests (AC: #1-#10)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: POST /api/projects automatically adds creator as owner member (per PROJ §7.1)
GET /api/projects returns only projects where user is a member (membership filter)
GET /api/projects/{id} includes userRole field (viewer/editor/owner) for current user
PATCH /api/projects/{id} requires owner role (403 Forbidden if editor or viewer role)
DELETE /api/projects/{id} soft deletes project (sets deleted_at timestamp, requires owner role)
POST /api/projects/{id}/members requires owner role (403 if not owner)
DELETE /api/projects/{id}/members/{id} prevents removing last owner (validation error: "Cannot remove last owner")
Member roles enforced on all operations per PROJ §2.4 (viewer: read only, editor: create, owner: manage)

artifacts.docs:
<doc path="docs/sprint-artifacts/tech-spec-epic-1.md" title="Epic 1 Technical Specification" section="Data Models - Project Member Entity (New)" snippet="id UUID PRIMARY KEY, project_id UUID NOT NULL (FK), user_id UUID (nullable, FK to users), organization_id UUID (nullable), role VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL ('viewer' | 'editor' | 'owner'), created_by UUID NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP, expires_at TIMESTAMP (nullable). CHECK constraints: role IN ('viewer', 'editor', 'owner'), (user_id IS NOT NULL AND organization_id IS NULL) OR (user_id IS NULL AND organization_id IS NOT NULL). UNIQUE (project_id, user_id), UNIQUE (project_id, organization_id). Validation: COUNT(project_members WHERE project_id = ?) < max_project_members." />
<doc path="docs/sprint-artifacts/tech-spec-epic-1.md" title="Epic 1 Technical Specification" section="Open Questions §Q1 Decision - Member Limit" snippet="System-configurable limit of 100 'members' (individuals or organization groups) per project. Validation: COUNT(project_members WHERE project_id = ?) < max_project_members before adding." />

artifact.reason: Desktop Project interface - shows expected structure (id, title, description, createdAt, updatedAt, deletedAt, metadata, privacyMode) - reference for API DTO
Desktop ProjectAPI defines expected API contract for project operations from Desktop perspective
Desktop ProjectStore handles project state management - reference for expected data flow
Existing project handler unit tests - reference for test patterns

story-context.constraints: - **Repository Separation:** Moku API backend is SEPARATE repository. ProjectController/Service/Repository implementation is in Moku API codebase, NOT in this desktop project. - **Project-Member Relationship:** Many-to-many via project_members join table. Each membership has role (viewer|editor|owner) and optional expiration. Projects can have individuals (user_id) OR organization groups (organization_id), both count toward 100-member limit. Creator immutable (project.created_by) used for thread ownership transfer. - **Role Hierarchy:** Viewer: Read project, threads, members list. Editor: Viewer + create threads, execute workflows, upload files. Owner: Editor + manage members, update project, delete project. - **Soft Delete Pattern:** Projects use deleted_at timestamp (not hard delete). Preserves audit trail and prevents FK constraint violations. Deleted projects filtered from queries (WHERE deleted_at IS NULL). - **Updates Polling:** Desktop polls /api/projects/{id}/updates?since={lastPollTime}. Backend counts changes (threads, members, workflows) after timestamp. - **Member Limit Enforcement:** System-configurable limit (default: 100). Validate before adding members: COUNT(project_members WHERE project_id = ?) < max_project_members. Return 400 Bad Request with "Member limit exceeded" if limit reached. - **Thread Ownership Transfer:** When user removed from project, transfer owned threads to project creator: UPDATE desktop_threads SET owner_id = (SELECT created_by FROM projects WHERE id = ?) WHERE owner_id = ? AND project_id = ?. Threads remain visible to all project members. - **Audit Logging:** Send audit events to Holokai audit system on role changes. Format: {event: 'project.member.role_changed', actorId, targetUserId, projectId, oldRole, newRole, timestamp}. - **Last Admin Protection:** Cannot remove last admin from project. Before removing member, check: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_members WHERE project_id = ? AND role = 'admin'. If count = 1 and removing that admin, return 400 "Cannot remove last admin". - **Dependency on E1-S1:** Database schema changes from E1-S1 must be applied first (V2.2 migration creates projects and project_members tables). Verify E1-S1 is complete before starting. - **Dependency on E1-S5:** AuthorizationService will be implemented in E1-S5. For this story, create AuthorizationService stub/interface if E1-S5 not complete. Actual authorization logic will be implemented by E1-S5.

interface.name: GET /api/projects
interface.signature: GET /api/projects?page={int}&size={int} → Response: PagedResponse<ProjectDTO> {content: [{id, name, description, status, memberCount, createdAt, updatedAt}], totalElements: int, totalPages: int}

interface.name: GET /api/projects/{id}
interface.signature: GET /api/projects/{projectId} → Response: ProjectDetailDTO {id, name, description, createdBy, organizationId, status, metadata, memberCount, createdAt, updatedAt, userRole}

interface.name: POST /api/projects
interface.signature: POST /api/projects Request: {name, description?, metadata?} → Response: ProjectDTO (201 Created), auto-creates admin membership for creator

interface.name: PATCH /api/projects/{id}
interface.signature: PATCH /api/projects/{projectId} Request: {name?, description?, metadata?} → Response: ProjectDTO (200 OK), requires admin role

interface.name: DELETE /api/projects/{id}
interface.signature: DELETE /api/projects/{projectId} → Response: 204 No Content (soft delete, sets deleted_at), requires admin role

interface.name: GET /api/projects/{id}/updates
interface.signature: GET /api/projects/{projectId}/updates?since={ISO8601} → Response: {threadsUpdated: int, membersUpdated: int, workflowsUpdated: int, latestUpdate: timestamp}

interface.name: GET /api/projects/{id}/members
interface.signature: GET /api/projects/{projectId}/members → Response: [MemberDTO] {id, userId, organizationId, userName, userEmail, role, createdBy, createdAt, expiresAt}

interface.name: POST /api/projects/{id}/members
interface.signature: POST /api/projects/{projectId}/members Request: {userId, role: 'view'|'edit'|'admin', expiresAt?} → Response: MemberDTO (201 Created), requires admin role

interface.name: PATCH /api/projects/{id}/members/{memberId}
interface.signature: PATCH /api/projects/{projectId}/members/{memberId} Request: {role: 'view'|'edit'|'admin'} → Response: MemberDTO (200 OK), requires admin role

interface.name: DELETE /api/projects/{id}/members/{memberId}
interface.signature: DELETE /api/projects/{projectId}/members/{memberId} → Response: 204 No Content, requires admin role, validation: Cannot remove last admin

tests.standards: Use JUnit 5 for test structure. Use Mockito 5.x for mocking services/repositories. Use Spring Boot Test with @SpringBootTest for integration tests. Use Testcontainers for PostgreSQL database. Test auto-membership creation: POST project, verify creator in project_members with role='admin'. Test membership filtering: Create project, GET as non-member, expect empty list. Test role enforcement: PATCH/DELETE as non-admin, expect 403. Test last admin protection: DELETE only admin member, expect 400. Test thread ownership transfer: Remove member with owned threads, verify owner_id updated to project.created_by.
tests.locations: moku-api/src/test/java/com/holokai/moku/ (unit and integration tests for Moku API backend)

test.idea: Integration test: POST /api/projects with name='Test Project', verify response ProjectDTO + query project_members, verify creator has role='admin'
Integration test: Create project as userA, GET /api/projects as userB (non-member), expect empty list
Integration test: GET /api/projects/{id}, verify response includes userRole field matching current user's role in project
Integration test: PATCH /api/projects/{id} as user with edit role, expect 403 Forbidden
Integration test: DELETE /api/projects/{id} as admin, verify deleted_at timestamp set (not hard deleted), verify GET returns 404
Integration test: POST /api/projects/{id}/members as user with edit role, expect 403 Forbidden
Integration test: PATCH /api/projects/{id}/members/{memberId} to change role as non-admin, expect 403
Integration test: Project with 1 admin, DELETE that admin member, expect 400 with message 'Cannot remove last admin'
Unit test: ProjectMemberService.isLastAdmin() method with mock data (1 admin → true, 2 admins → false)
Integration test: Create thread, update thread, add member, GET /api/projects/{id}/updates?since=T, verify threadsUpdated=1, membersUpdated=1
Integration test: Test role matrix - (view/edit/admin role) × (read/create/update/delete operations), verify permissions enforced correctly
Integration test: Project member limit - add 100 members, attempt 101st, expect 400 'Member limit exceeded'
Integration test: Thread ownership transfer - userA owns thread in project, remove userA from project, verify thread.owner_id = project.created_by
Integration test: Change member role from edit to admin, verify audit event sent to Holokai system with format {event, actorId, targetUserId, projectId, oldRole, newRole}
